candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current asset component, but not the total.
Cash flow section header/change-working-capital context, not the balance sheet total.
Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Cash component only; less complete than cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: CASH AND CASH EQUIVALENTS AT THE END OF THE PERIOD
candidates.why: Cash flow ending cash agrees conceptually, but balance sheet is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Preferred balance-sheet cash line over cash-flow ending cash.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Wrong maturity bucket.
Best explicit current portion of debt line; fits short-term/current maturities of long-term debt and excludes lease rows.
Current interest-bearing debt could be relevant, but this label also appears as a total current debt line and could overlap with current maturities; avoid double counting.

variables.notes: Used the explicit current maturities debt line. Did not add 'Interest-bearing liabilities' to avoid possible double counting with current maturities. Excluded lease-related rows per instructions.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.
Tax asset, opposite of taxes payable.
Tax asset, not tax payable.

variables.notes: Chosen outside the shortlist because no TXP candidates were provided, but this is a clear current tax liability label.

candidates.why: Best match for total/net property, plant and equipment (tangible assets). Preferred over individual asset classes and over gross totals.
Related, but gross is less preferred than net total.
Major PPE component, but only one class of tangible assets, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit total tangible assets line even though preview values are blank; labels may exist in other years and are semantically the best PPE match.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: NET CASH FLOW FROM OPERATING ACTIVITIES INVESTING ACTIVITIES
candidates.why: This row contains the net cash flow from operating activities, despite the concatenated next section header in the label.
Section header only, not the net cash flow amount.

final_choice.row_label: NET CASH FLOW FROM OPERATING ACTIVITIES INVESTING ACTIVITIES

variables.notes: Selected the operating cash flow total as labeled on the cash flow statement.
